channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Portfolio hacks for African devs to land remote jobs
item.description: Ship one project, get hired remotely — how to build a portfolio that actually works from Africa. 250-line simulator beats 2000-line monorepo every time.

item.title: Edge functions in 2026: where they really win
item.description: The latency to Singapore dropped from 320 ms to 65 ms, and the bill dropped to $8/month.

item.title: 2026’s 2 highest-paying AI skill stacks
item.description: Cut AI salary premiums 15–22%: prompt RAG vs MLOps+vector search in 2026 with concrete benchmarks, stack choices, and hiring data. Learn which skill actually moves the needle.

item.title: Set connection pool size too high? Rollback hell awaits
item.description: Cut PostgreSQL pool failures 70% by shrinking pools — Node.js 20 LTS, Kubernetes, and PostgreSQL 16 benchmarks from 2026

item.title: Land $65k remote from $3k-city
item.description: Land fair remote pay from higher-cost countries — use Parabol async negotiation, Wise/Payoneer for payments, and a spreadsheet formula that adjusts for your cost of living and client budget.

item.title: Compare WebSockets, SSE, long polling in 2026
item.description: Pick the right real-time tool in 2026 — concrete latency, cost, and Safari support data behind WebSockets, SSE, and long polling for 1k concurrent users.

item.title: Ship projects, not hype: portfolio wins remote jobs
item.description: Build a remote-dev portfolio that actually works: 48-hour projects, $12/month costs, and READMEs that land interviews — not viral clones.

item.title: 4 hidden costs of RAG in production
item.description: Cut RAG cost 86% and latency 61% with a semantic cache keyed by query text. Learn the three traps tutorials never mention: reranker cost, cache stampede, and pgvector ef_search tuning.

item.title: Designing AI systems that don’t crumble
item.description: Cut AI inference costs 60% with prompt caching, provider fallbacks, and token budgets — the boring patterns that actually work in 2026 production systems.

item.title: Remote salary: figure how much to ask
item.description: Negotiate remote salaries from lower-cost countries with data-driven rates, currency buffers, and negotiation tactics that actually work in 2026

item.title: Choose Wisely: WebSocket, SSE, or Polling?
item.description: Choose SSE for read-only feeds, WebSocket for high-frequency chat, long polling for request/response — real 2026 latency and cost numbers from a 100-user load test on t4g.medium ARM

item.title: Drop the pool size myth
item.description: Set max pool size to 8, not formula — measure hold time and waiting threads to cut latency 50% and save $800/month on RDS costs with PostgreSQL 16 and Node 20 LTS.

item.title: Ship a demo, not a resume
item.description: Ship a demo, not a resume — 93% of African devs fail because their portfolios don’t prove they can build systems that work under load. Learn how to build a high-signal remote portfolio in 2026.

item.title: Fine-tuning vs prompts: salary gap in 2026
item.description: Fine-tune 7B models 40% cheaper than prompt-only chains — and earn 2.3x more: model selection, LoRA, vLLM, and the deployment mistakes most teams make.

item.title: 50k builds: GitHub Actions vs CircleCI cost
item.description: Slashed CI costs 22% at 50k builds by switching to CircleCI — real numbers, runner queue wait times, and cache storage gotchas most teams miss.

item.title: Ship a portfolio recruiters DM
item.description: Ship a $0 portfolio recruiters DM in 2026 — FastAPI + Redis 7.2 demo beats GitHub streaks and Medium series

item.title: Database pools: CPU cores are a myth
item.description: Cut API latency 55% and CPU 35% by fixing connection pool size — stop using CPU cores. Formula, benchmarks, and config snippets for PostgreSQL 15, Node 20, and Python 3.11.

item.title: Remote salary playbook: $120k script
item.description: Land $120k remote offers: PPP-adjusted spreadsheet counter template that raised my Colombia salary 24% in 5 days

item.title: Rank vector skills for 2026 salaries
item.description: Cut API response time 85%: LLMs vs vector search in 2026 salary data — concrete benchmarks, cost data, and the skill that pays 25% more.

item.title: RAG pipelines: the load tests fail
item.description: The goal: cut support tickets by 30% by letting users self-serve answers on loans, fees, and account issues.
